title: Frontend Developer Intern
description: Looking for an enthusiastic intern with a passion for building great user interfaces using React and Tailwind CSS. 3-6 months duration with stipend.

title: Business Development Executive
description: Join our fast-growing startup to drive B2B sales. Requirements: Excellent communication skills, 1-2 years experience, willing to travel within India.

title: Graphic Designer
description: We need a creative designer proficient in Adobe Creative Suite and Figma to work on brand identity and social media campaigns.

title: Social Media Marketing Intern
description: Work on real campaigns for top brands. Learn campaign management, analytics, and content creation. Freshers welcome.
